name: Starbucks-style Loyalty
description_en: Stars accumulate to unlock Green/Gold tiers with personalized daily challenges and birthday rewards.
description_cn: 积分累积升级 Green/Gold 等级，附带每日个性化挑战与生日券。

name: Pinduoduo Group Buy
description_en: Viral price-cut + group-buy + share-to-win loop that turns every buyer into a recruiter.
description_cn: 砍一刀 + 拼团 + 分享赢的病毒裂变循环，让每个买家变成拉新员。

name: Duolingo Streak Engine
description_en: Daily streak + leagues + life system + smart quests — the world's most replicated retention loop.
description_cn: 每日连击 + 联赛 + 生命系统 + 智能任务，全球最被复制的留存循环。

rules.name: Promote at end of league cycle

name: Barq-style Daily Spin
description_en: Reward roulette with daily rate-limit feeding a redemption store. Pure dopamine loop.
description_cn: 每日限次抽奖转盘 + 兑换商店，纯粹的多巴胺循环。

name: Fortnite Battle Pass
description_en: Seasonal pass with free + premium tracks, quest-driven XP, and FOMO limited drops.
description_cn: 赛季战令双轨（免费/付费）、任务驱动XP、限时掉落FOMO。

rules.name: Award pass XP on quest complete

name: Strava Social Fitness
description_en: Friend graph + activity feed + auto-share + segment leaderboards. Network-effect retention.
description_cn: 好友图谱 + 动态信息流 + 自动分享 + 路段排行榜，网络效应留存。

name: Nike Run Streak
description_en: Daily run streak with achievement badges and auto-share to social. Habit-forming health loop.
description_cn: 每日跑步连击、成就徽章、社交自动分享，健康习惯养成循环。

name: Pokemon GO Raid
description_en: Cooperative raid groups + tier difficulty + trading post for caught items. Location-social hybrid.
description_cn: 合作团战副本 + 阶级难度 + 物品交易市集，地理社交混合。

name: McDonald's Monopoly
description_en: Collect-em-all promo with limited-drop rare pieces converting to vouchers. Classic 6-week sprint.
description_cn: 集卡式促销，稀有卡限时掉落兑换券，经典6周冲刺活动。

name: Dropbox Tiered Referral
description_en: 1/5/25-tier referral ladder rewarding storage currency. The original $0 CAC growth hack.
description_cn: 1/5/25 阶梯推荐，存储空间作为奖励货币，原始零获客成本增长黑客。

name: Uber Driver Pro Tier
name_cn: Uber 司机 Pro 阶级
description_en: Driver-side tier (Blue/Gold/Platinum/Diamond) + league + weekly quests. Supply-side retention.
description_cn: 司机端阶级（Blue/Gold/Platinum/Diamond）+ 联赛 + 周任务，供给侧留存。

name: WeChat Red Packet
description_en: First-come-first-served random gift-sending in group chats. The viral mechanic that built WeChat Pay.
description_cn: 群聊先到先得的随机红包发送，造就微信支付的病毒机制。

rules.name: Award sender XP per packet sent

name: Book Club Reading Streak
description_en: XP per finished book + 5-book streak voucher + weekly meeting bonus + reading leaderboard. Designed for community book clubs (老李 Guangzhou style).
description_cn: 每本完读得XP + 5本连击免费一月会籍券 + 每周线下读书会签到额外XP + 阅读进度排行榜。专为社区读书会设计。

rules.name: Bonus XP on weekly meeting attendance

wireframe_hint: Shows reading progress bar + recent book covers grid + member leaderboard with avatars

metadata.source: 老李 Guangzhou book club retention pattern

name: Course Completion Engine
description_en: Lesson-by-lesson XP + daily learning streak + course-end certificate + parent-shareable dashboard. Built for online education / tutoring.
description_cn: 逐课XP + 每日学习连击 + 课程结业证书 + 家长可分享进度面板。在线教育/培训机构通用。
wireframe_hint: Progress ring per course + streak flame + parent-view toggle + share certificate button

name: Gym Class Attendance Streak
description_en: Check-in per class + 10-class streak free week + body-progress milestones + buddy referral bonus. Fitness-studio retention.
description_cn: 每节课签到 + 10节课连击送一周高级会员 + 体测里程碑徽章 + 邀请朋友双方得XP。健身房留存通用配方。

rules.name: Award XP + streak on class check-in

wireframe_hint: Calendar grid of attended classes + body-progress chart + buddy invite card

name: Subscription Anniversary Loyalty
description_en: Monthly renewal level-up + 3/6/12/24-month anniversary milestones + refer-a-friend extends both 1 month + churn-prevention rescue trigger. Subscription-business retention.
description_cn: 每月续费升一级 + 3/6/12/24个月周年里程碑 + 邀请朋友双方延期一月 + 流失预警挽留触发。订阅业务通用挽留配方。
wireframe_hint: Anniversary timeline (months as gems) + tier badge + churn rescue toast + referral progress bar

name: Parent-Child Learning Engagement
description_en: Parent earns XP from child's progress + multi-child support + private family leaderboard + quarterly milestone voucher. Kids-education engagement loop.
description_cn: 孩子进步家长得XP + 多孩兄弟姐妹支持 + 私密家庭排行榜 + 季度里程碑¥50券。儿童教育亲子绑定。

rules.name: Family pool XP on child progress

wireframe_hint: Family avatar group + each child progress card + shared family XP bar + quarterly voucher card

name: Inactive User Rescue Campaign
description_en: Fires at 14+ days inactive: personalized push + one-time ¥50 return voucher + 30-day re-engagement quest chain. Generic churn-killer.
description_cn: 14天未活跃自动触发：个性化推送 + 一次性¥50回归券 + 30天重新参与任务链。通用流失挽回配方。

rules.name: Grant return voucher on first re-open

wireframe_hint: Welcome-back hero card + ¥50 voucher countdown + 30-day quest checklist

name: Book Review Social Layer
description_en: XP for posting reviews + XP for liking peers + monthly top-reviewer spotlight + cross-member kudos. Community engagement on top of any reading product.
description_cn: 发评论得XP + 点赞别人评论得XP + 每月最佳评论者高亮+奖励 + 跨成员鼓励互动。读书产品社交层。

rules.name: Award XP when peer likes your review

wireframe_hint: Review feed cards + like button + monthly top-3 spotlight bar + author avatars

name: Community Event Attendance
description_en: RSVP + on-site check-in XP + 3-events-in-a-month chain badge + anniversary invite for loyal members. Built for offline community organizers.
description_cn: 活动报名 + 现场签到XP + 月内3场参与解锁徽章 + 周年邀请忠诚老成员。线下社群组织者通用。
wireframe_hint: Upcoming events list + check-in QR + month-attendance ring + tier badge

name: Daily Knowledge Quiz
description_en: Daily/weekly trivia + streak rewards + topic-mastery badges + tournament mode for peers. Education-meets-game loop.
description_cn: 每日/每周问答 + 连击奖励 + 主题掌握度徽章 + 锦标赛模式与同伴竞赛。教育游戏化通用。
wireframe_hint: Today's quiz card + streak flame + topic mastery wheel + this-week tournament bracket

name: Personal Wellness Journey
description_en: Habit tracking (sleep, exercise, meditation) + personal goal milestones + community challenge mode + health-score progression. Wellness app retention.
description_cn: 习惯追踪（睡眠、运动、冥想） + 个人目标里程碑 + 社群共同挑战 + 健康分进阶。健康类App通用留存。

rules.name: Update health score on habit log

wireframe_hint: Health score ring + 3 habit cards (sleep/exercise/meditation) + community challenge progress + tier badge

name: Pre-Departure Countdown
description_en: 60-day countdown game with daily check-ins, visa/document reminders and a packing checklist that builds trip anticipation.
description_cn: 出发前60天倒计时打卡 + 签证证件提醒 + 行李清单，让用户期待出行。

rules.name: Issue ready-to-fly voucher when packing list complete

wireframe_hint: Countdown clock at top + packing checklist + visa/passport reminder cards + flight info

name: Globetrotter Loyalty
description_en: XP per booked trip rolls up to master-level tiers spanning destinations, like Marriott Bonvoy meets airline status.
description_cn: 每次预订积累XP，跨目的地累计升级至大师等级，类似万豪+航司金卡。
wireframe_hint: World map with visited stamps + tier badge + XP bar + recent achievements

metadata.source: Marriott Bonvoy + Star Alliance + Airbnb hybrid

name: Group Travel Cohesion
description_en: Groups of N travelers earn shared badges at each itinerary milestone — boarding, arrival, daily activities — turning logistics into a coop quest.
description_cn: N人成团，每个行程节点（登机/抵达/每日活动）共同解锁徽章，把行程变成合作任务。

rules.name: Advance group stage on majority check-in

wireframe_hint: Group avatar bar + itinerary stages with check-in dots + shared badge wall + group chat feed

name: Property Viewing Journey
description_en: Virtual tour mini-game + viewing booking flow + post-tour follow-up quests guide buyers from browse to offer.
description_cn: 虚拟看房游戏 + 预约看房 + 看房后跟进任务，把浏览者引导到下单。
wireframe_hint: Property card with virtual-tour CTA + booking calendar + journey progress bar (browse→close) + follow-up reminders

name: Agent Marketplace Matching
description_en: Clients pick agents, agents pick properties — bidirectional matching with reputation scores and response-time tiers.
description_cn: 客户挑经纪人，经纪人挑房源，双向匹配 + 信誉分 + 响应速度等级。

rules.name: Update agent rating on client review

wireframe_hint: Agent card with rating stars, response-time badge, tier crest + 'pick me' CTA + leaderboard sidebar

name: Buyer Education Series
description_en: Progressive content series + Q&A + ROI/risk calculators teach first-time buyers, with XP and 'qualified buyer' badge unlocks.
description_cn: 递进内容系列 + Q&A + 投资回报/风险测算，教育首次置业者，附XP和'合格买家'徽章解锁。
wireframe_hint: 6-chapter storyquest map + article cards + ROI calculator widget + qualified-buyer badge progress

name: Courier 5-Star Rating
description_en: Customers rate couriers 1–5 stars after each delivery; courier tiers and bonus payouts derive from rolling rating.
description_cn: 每单送达后用户1-5星评价，骑手等级与奖金按滚动评分发放。
wireframe_hint: Post-delivery 5-star prompt + courier profile with avg-stars + weekly leaderboard + tier crest

name: Shipment Status Journey
description_en: created → picked → in_transit → delivered notification chain with kid-side gamification (cartoon truck moving across map).
description_cn: 包裹下单→揽收→运输→送达通知链，附儿童端游戏化（卡通卡车地图位移）。
wireframe_hint: Truck cartoon moving across stages (created→delivered) + push notification on each stage + child-mode toggle

name: Recurring Sender Loyalty
description_en: Recurring shippers earn XP per parcel and unlock bulk-discount vouchers, classic B2B/SMB retention.
description_cn: 经常寄件的用户每单累积XP，解锁批量折扣券，经典B2B/小微留存。
wireframe_hint: Monthly shipment counter + tier badge + bulk voucher card + weekly-streak flame

name: Shared-Ride Micro Loyalty
description_en: Points per ride/rental compound into tier discounts — classic Mobike/Lime style retention on cheap unit-economics.
description_cn: 每次骑行/租用积分，累积升级换折扣，摩拜/Lime式的低客单价留存。

rules.name: Issue weekly pass at commuter tier

wireframe_hint: Ride counter + tier crest + weekly pass voucher + daily-ride streak flame

name: Deposit-as-Voucher Recovery
description_en: Converts the typical ¥99 deposit into a refundable wallet voucher, removing friction while keeping LTV.
description_cn: 把99元押金转为钱包内可退代金券，去除门槛同时锁定LTV。

rules.name: Refund deposit voucher to bank on request

wireframe_hint: Wallet card showing ¥99 voucher balance + 'use for ride' or 'refund to bank' buttons + history

name: Off-Peak Bonus XP
description_en: Bonus XP and discount vouchers for off-peak rides/rentals — supply rebalance via demand shaping.
description_cn: 错峰时段骑行/租用奖励额外XP和折扣券，通过需求端整形再平衡供给。

rules.name: Issue off-peak voucher on first off-peak ride of day

wireframe_hint: Time-window banner ('off-peak active 10-16') + bonus XP highlight + 50% voucher card

name: KYC Onboarding Flow
description_en: Phone OTP + risk profile questionnaire + 双录 (audio/video) consent — compliant onboarding with progress quests.
description_cn: 手机OTP + 风险测评问卷 + 双录同意书，合规开户附进度任务。

rules.name: Grant verified badge on account active

wireframe_hint: 5-step progress bar (phone→ID→risk→consent→active) + per-step CTA + verified badge

name: Cross-Product Unlock Path
description_en: Hold a money-market fund → unlock wealth management → unlock insurance, with voucher rewards at each gate.
description_cn: 持有货币基金→解锁理财→解锁保险，每道门给代金券奖励。

rules.name: Unlock wealth mgmt after money market 30d

wireframe_hint: 4-stage product unlock ladder + voucher reward badge per gate + holding-period progress bar

name: Suitability Compliance Gate
description_en: Auto-block C2 risk-tolerance users from R5 high-risk products with banner explanation — mandatory CSRC rule wrapped as UX.
description_cn: 自动阻止C2低风险用户购买R5高风险产品，附说明条幅——把证监会合规要求包装为UX。

params.block_message_cn: 您的风险等级为C2，无法购买R5产品

rules.name: Grant informed-investor badge after risk education

wireframe_hint: Purchase modal with risk mismatch banner + 'learn about risk' CTA + informed-investor badge progress

metadata.source: CSRC 适当性管理办法 + product UX

name: Treatment Cycle Reminders
description_en: Per-treatment recurring reminders — HA every 4–6 months, laser every 3 months, botox every 4 months — tied to per-customer next-visit calendar.
description_cn: 按项目周期复购提醒：玻尿酸4-6月/激光3月/肉毒4月，绑定客户下次到访日历。
wireframe_hint: Per-treatment calendar dots (HA/laser/botox) + next-visit countdown + on-cycle streak flame + 15% voucher

name: Referral Chain Bonus
description_en: Refer a friend, friend completes first treatment → referrer gets ¥500 voucher. High-trust word-of-mouth in beauty vertical.
description_cn: 推荐好友，好友首次到院消费后推荐人获500元代金券。美业高信任口碑核心。

rules.name: Issue referrer voucher on friend's first treatment
Issue newcomer voucher on signup via referral

wireframe_hint: Share-via-WeChat CTA + referral tree showing pending/completed friends + ¥500 voucher counter

name: Before/After Photo Album
description_en: Secure encrypted photo storage with consent gates + selective share-with-doctor permissions + opt-in social showcase.
description_cn: 加密存储术前/术后照片 + 同意书闸门 + 选择性授权给医生 + 自愿展示到社区。

rules.name: Grant transformation badge on first before/after pair

wireframe_hint: Side-by-side before/after slider + privacy padlock + 'share with doctor' toggle + opt-in community showcase

name: Follow-Up Care Reminders
description_en: Vaccination boosters + annual checkup reminders within a 365-day window, with per-condition recurring schedules.
description_cn: 疫苗加强针 + 年检提醒（365天周期），按病种循环排程。
wireframe_hint: Care calendar with next checkup/booster dots + yearly streak flame + on-time-carer badge

metadata.source: Ping An Good Doctor + 微医 (WeDoctor)

name: Specialist Pick & Book
description_en: Doctor profile cards + booking flow + post-visit feedback closes the loop on physician selection.
description_cn: 医生资料卡 + 预约流程 + 就诊后评价，闭环专科医生选择。
wireframe_hint: Doctor card with avatar/rating/specialty + booking calendar + post-visit review modal + specialty leaderboard

name: Family Proxy Account
description_en: Guardian books for child/elderly with proxy consent — multi-profile under one master account with role-based permissions.
description_cn: 监护人代订儿童/老人就诊，附代办同意书；一个主账户下多档案，按角色授权。

rules.name: Require proxy consent before booking dependent

wireframe_hint: Family profile picker (parent/child/elder avatars) + proxy-consent banner + per-profile appointment list

metadata.source: Ping An Family + Haodaifu family accounts

name: Pet Vaccination Calendar
description_en: Recurring vaccination reminders per pet, multi-pet support, with annual booster cadence.
description_cn: 每只宠物独立疫苗提醒，支持多宠家庭，年度加强针节律。
wireframe_hint: Pet selector + calendar with vaccine dots + 'next due' countdown + healthy-pet badge

name: Grooming Streak
description_en: Every 4 weeks grooming visit = streak + tier upgrade, classic loyalty in pet salon vertical.
description_cn: 每4周一次美容形成连击，升级会员等级；宠物美容店经典留存。
wireframe_hint: 4-week countdown + grooming streak flame + VIP-paw tier crest + free-groom voucher progress (12 stamps)

name: Cross-Clinic Health Records
description_en: Pet medical record continuity across multiple clinics within a master account, with consent-based share between vets.
description_cn: 宠物在不同诊所的就诊记录通过主账户打通，附兽医间授权共享。

rules.name: Share records with new vet via consent

wireframe_hint: Timeline view of vet visits + record-type icons + 'share with vet' QR/code + complete-history badge

name: Seller Onboarding Journey
description_en: Listing creation streak + photo quality bonus + first-sale celebration onboards new sellers like Etsy/Taobao.
description_cn: 上架连击 + 照片质量奖 + 首单庆祝，像Etsy/淘宝那样启程新卖家。
wireframe_hint: 5-stage seller journey (listing→view→inquiry→sale→10th) + listing streak flame + photo-quality meter

metadata.source: Etsy seller onboarding + Taobao 新店扶持

name: Buyer Protection & Trust
description_en: Review-after-purchase XP + dispute trust score keeps buyers reviewing and sellers honest, classic two-sided trust.
description_cn: 购物后评价奖XP + 纠纷信任分，保持买家评价和卖家诚信，双边市场经典信任体系。

rules.name: Penalize trust score on dispute lost

wireframe_hint: Post-purchase review modal (text/photo/video tabs) + trust-score gauge + dispute resolution tracker

name: Listing Boost (Tui Yi Xia)
description_en: Sellers spend wallet credit to '推一下' (boost) a listing to top of feed for N hours — Xianyu/Taobao Zhitongche micro-monetization.
description_cn: 卖家用钱包余额'推一下'，让宝贝在信息流置顶N小时；闲鱼/淘宝直通车式微变现。

rules.name: Gift first boost to new sellers

wireframe_hint: Listing card with '推一下' CTA + boost duration picker (2h/8h/24h) + wallet balance + countdown when active
